category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU implementation of which utility; source_facts.executables contains which.
display_name_sources: Official Savannah project and source_facts.homepage identify the GNU which project.
docs_sources: No dedicated online GNU manual was found; official Savannah project page is the best official documentation surface from source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: Official Savannah GNU which Git page lists clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/which.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable name identify a command-line shell/path lookup utility.
